special_mechanics.name: Two-Lane Battle System
special_mechanics.description: Players can change between background and foreground rows at any time during multiplayer matches. In single-player, CPU opponent must change rows first before player can switch rows in most stages.

special_mechanics.name: Special Move Inputs
special_mechanics.description: Characters perform special techniques via joystick and button combinations. Input methods are shown during gameplay after bonus rounds.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and controls but contains no quantitative physics parameters (speeds, gravity, acceleration values, or sub-pixel system details).
sources_used: Wikipedia - Fatal Fury: King of Fighters
